title: Spicy Apricot Jam Stir Fry
description: A sweet and spicy stir fry with a twist of apricot jam, inspired by Ethiopian flavors.

ingredients.name: stir-fry veggies
ingredients.notes: such as broccoli, carrots, and snap peas

instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add onions and bell peppers, stir-fry until softened.
Add stir-fry veggies and cook until tender.
In a small bowl, mix together spicy stir fry sauce and apricot jam.
Add the sauce mixture to the pan and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Add honey and stir-fry for another minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
